raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Prettineeks irr fa-
wu Rohku pee wiſſeem winnas
zeenigeem Rihkeem isſteepis/ jo
wiſſai bij jareds/ ka tee Paga-
ni fwehtā Weetā gahje/ no ka tu
eſti pawehlejs/ ka teem tawā
Drandsibā ne bij nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſſi winnas Laudis
nopuhſchabs Maisi mekledami/
tee irr fatwas dahrgas Leetas par
Barribu tsderwufchi to Dwehfeli
atspirdsinaht/ redst KUNGS/
un apluhko/ ka Negohdā es ef-
mu tappuft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak! jums wiſſeem (faE-
Eu es/) kad juhs pa Zettu fezzen
eetat/ usluhkojeet un raugajt/
arrig kadgas Sahpes irraid/ ka
mannas Sahpes? kas man irr
uſgabjutchas/ ar ko tas KUNGS
manni irr apbehdinajs/ tai Dee-
nā winna karſtas Bahrsibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No augſchenes irr wiſſch
weenu Ugguni fuhtijs mannēs
Kaulōs/ pahr ko wiſſch irr wal-
dijs. Wiſſch irr mannahin Rah-
jahm weenu Tibkli isplehtis/ un
lizzis manni atpakkat greestees/
Wiſſch irr manni pohſta/ un
fehrdsigu darrijs zauru Deenu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Juhgs mannu Greh-
fu irr zaur Winna Rohku fa-
feets/ tee irr fafeetti/ un manne
Kaklu lifti/ Wiſſch irr mannu
Spehku lizzis fafrist/ tas KUNGS
irr manni (winnu) Rohkahm
nodewis/ ka es ne warru zeltees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr wiſſus
mannus Warrenus eeksh man-
nim faminnis/ Wiſſch irr pahr
manni Sa-eefchann istanzis/ ka
wiſſch mannas Jaunektus ta-
treektu/ tas irr tai Jumprawai
tai Meitai Juhda lizzis to Wih-
na-Spaidu miht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pahr fehahin Leetahm
raudaja manna Azz/ manna
Azz noteſſ ar Ubdeni/ tapehz ka-
tas Eepreezinatajs/ kam inannu
Dwehfeli bij atspirdsinaht/ tah-
tu no mannim irraid/ manni
Behrni irr pohſtiti/ jo tas Ee-
naidneeks irr pahrwarrejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ziana ispleſch jawas Roh-
kas/ Eepreezinataja preekſch win-
nas newa/ jo tas KUNGS irr
teem prett Jehfabu pawehlejs/
kas apkahrt winnu irr/ ka tee
winnas Prettineeki efhus/ starp
teem irr Jerusaleme ka tweena
tahrnaina Seewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr taiſns/
jo es etmu winna Muttei pret-
titurejees. Klausajt jelle wiſ-
ft Laudis/ un raugajt mannas
Sahpes/ mannas Jumprawas/
un manni Jaunehti irr Zeetuma-
gabjuſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es peefauzu mannu
Mihletajns/ bet tee ter manni
wiſluſchi/ manni Preestezi un
Wazzaje irr Pilefahta to Dweh-
feli ielaifuschi/ jo tee mekleja
preekſch jewim Barribu/ ka tee
warretu jawu Dwehfeli atspir-
dinaht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
